name: Policy-Driven Procurement Strategy
consequences: Immediate: Lobby for mandatory platform-neutral clauses in public-sector procurement → Systemic: 25% reduction in Apple/Google app-store dependency by 2029 (based on EU procurement trends) → Strategic: Forces suppliers to adopt open standards, reducing long-term vendor lock-in. Controls short-term compliance costs vs. long-term sovereignty. Weakness: The options fail to consider geopolitical shifts in tech regulation.

Create a coalition to pressure Digitaliseringsstyrelsen into revising procurement guidelines
Leverage EU eIDAS2 framework to enforce interoperability mandates
review: Controls short-term compliance costs vs. long-term sovereignty. Weakness: The options fail to consider geopolitical shifts in tech regulation.

name: Open-Standard Authentication Framework
